mission.title: kagent: [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models
mission.description: [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current kagent deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kagent version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
helm list -n kagent 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kagent installation.

steps.title: Review kagent configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kagent configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
kubectl get configmap -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kagent
```
I am interested to use with Claude Sonnet 3.7, DeepSeek, and/or Amazon Nova.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models
steps.description:
Example `ModelConfig` usage:

```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret:
```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1
```

steps.title: Upgrade kagent to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kagent:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade kagent kagent/kagent --namespace kagent
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent
helm list -n kagent
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
kubectl get events -n kagent --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Example `ModelConfig` usage:

```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1
```

Requires setting credentials for aws in
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1

kubectl create secret generic aws-bedrock-credentials \
  --namespace kagent \
  --from-literal=AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=<access-key> \
  --from-literal=AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=<secret-key>

Error code: 404 - {'error': {'message': "The model doesn't exist or doesn't support this API. Retry your request with a different model ID.", 'type': 'not_found_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'model_not_found'}}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kagent installed or the issue environment reproducible.
